footer.description: A mutual aid campaign building a brighter future for Korean artists.
footer.guide: Visit our links and contact section for information about online exhibitions and purchases.

home.heroTitle:
Online Exhibition Now Open
Artworks Available for Purchase
home.heroDescription:
84.9% of Korean artists are excluded from primary banking.
Your support and purchases
become a strong pillar for artists.
home.shareDescription: Join SAF 2026, a special online exhibition to raise mutual aid funds for Korean artists.
home.joinMemberDesc: Become a member of Korea Smart Cooperative and support the mutual aid fund for artists.
home.buyArtworkDesc: Discover works by artists who care. Proceeds fund the mutual aid program for all artists.
home.archiveDesc: Explore the records and achievements of past exhibitions.
home.problemFinancialDesc: Artists struggle to prove regular income, leading to rejection from bank loans. Without a credit score, they are completely excluded from the financial system.
home.problemDebtDesc: With nowhere to borrow, artists rely on credit card loans and cash advances with interest rates approaching 20% annually.
home.problemDamageDesc: This hinders artists' creative activities and threatens the sustainability of the art ecosystem.
home.problemSolutionDesc: Mutual aid loans built on the fund of <orgLink>Korea Smart Cooperative</orgLink> and the trust of partner financial institutions are the answer.
home.solutionTrustDesc: When <orgLink>Korea Smart Cooperative</orgLink> builds a fund, partner financial institutions lend up to 7 times that amount to artists at low interest rates.
home.solutionProof: Over 95% of artists who received support have been faithfully repaying their loans. This proves that when given access to a trustworthy financial system, artists act responsibly.
home.metaTitle: SAF Online - Special Exhibition for Artist Mutual Aid Fund
home.metaDescription: SAF Online is a special online exhibition connecting co-op membership and artwork purchases to raise mutual aid loan funds for artists. Help provide a stable creative environment for financially excluded artists.
home.ogDescription: A special exhibition building a brighter future for Korean artists. Support artists by becoming a co-op member and purchasing artworks.
home.twitterDescription: Join SAF Online, a special exhibition raising mutual aid loan funds for artists.
home.heroGallerySubtitle: 110 artists, works waiting to be discovered
home.missionBanner: Your artwork purchase changes an artist's tomorrow
home.statsTitle: Artist Finance: The Reality in Numbers

support.title: Art protects art
support.stat0Label: artists are shut out by banks
support.stat2Label: repayment rate — trust comes full circle
support.soldCount: {count} artworks sold, each becoming a seed of solidarity
support.body:
Until the next exhibition, the next performance.
For artists, income gaps are an unavoidable reality.

For fellow artists forced into predatory loans just to afford paint, canvas, and studio rent, proceeds from this artwork become the Seed Fund — extending a fair hand at fair rates.
support.footer: One artwork becomes the oxygen that keeps a fellow artist creating.

galleryCampaign.heading: Every purchase makes a difference
galleryCampaign.descriptionLine1: These artists are building a future together with fellow artists.
galleryCampaign.descriptionLine2: Join the mutual aid fund through artwork purchases or co-op membership.
